component.name: Caffeine Applet
component.summary: Keep your system awake on demand

description.p: A simple COSMIC panel applet that prevents your system from going idle. Click the coffee icon to toggle an inhibit lock that blocks idle and sleep, keeping your screen on and your machine awake.
Uses the logind D-Bus interface, so it works on any system running systemd-logind or elogind. Minimal resource usage with no background processes.

screenshot.caption: Caffeine Applet in the COSMIC panel
